risk_title: Severe Civil Works Implementation Delays Affecting Project Delivery
risk_summary: Despite 250 contracts worth US$403 million signed, only 10% physical progress has been achieved as of April 2025. This critical implementation gap threatens project objectives and may create tensions between government, development partners, and communities expecting benefits.
evidence_quote: civil works implementation remains a concern with only 10 percent physical progress despite 250 contracts worth US$403 million signed as of April 2025

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in State Implementation Units
risk_summary: While 18 of 19 states have passed legislation establishing State Rural Road Agencies and State Road Funds, only three states (Bauchi, Ekiti, Sokoto) have operationalized these institutions. Weak institutional capacity in participating states may impede effective project implementation and create governance fragility.
evidence_quote: 18 out of 19 participating states have passed legislation to establish State Rural Road Agencies and State Road Funds, with Bauchi, Ekiti, and Sokoto already operationalizing these institutions through appointments, office setups, and budgetary support

risk_title: Governance and Coordination Challenges Between Development Partners and Government
risk_summary: The World Bank, AFD, and FPMU have had to plan regular field visits to accelerate progress, indicating coordination difficulties and potential tensions between external development actors and government implementation capacity. This reflects governance fragility in project management.
evidence_quote: prompting the World Bank, AFD, and FPMU to plan regular field visits to accelerate progress before the October 2025 mission

risk_summary: Progress towards achievement of PDO has declined from Moderately Satisfactory to Moderately Unsatisfactory, and Overall Implementation Progress has similarly declined. This worsening trajectory indicates systemic implementation challenges that may reflect underlying governance or conflict-related obstacles.
evidence_quote: Progress towards achievement of PDO Moderately Satisfactory Moderately Unsatisfactory Overall Implementation Progress (IP) Moderately Satisfactory Moderately Unsatisfactory
